column1: # GIGANTIC Upload Manifest - annotations_hmms Subproject
# Format: source_path<TAB>include
# source_path is relative to subproject root
# Glob patterns are supported (e.g., *.csv)
# Current publication policy (2026-05-05): InterProScan-only on the server.
# DeepLoc and MetaPredict are temporarily disabled while the per-tool
# InterProScan parser is the canonical entry point for collaborator browsing.
# DeepLoc subcellular localization predictions (70 species) - TEMPORARILY DISABLED
output_to_input/BLOCK_deeploc/*.csv
# MetaPredict intrinsic disorder predictions (70 species, 2 files each) - TEMPORARILY DISABLED
output_to_input/BLOCK_metapredict/*.tsv
# InterProScan domain annotations (parsed per-tool, 70 species x 10 sub-databases)
# Published via per-tool subdirectories of upload_to_server/. The bash
# upload-to-server script (this file) does not preserve directory structure
# (it flattens to the upload_to_server root via maxdepth=1), so the per-tool
# layout is created by a sidecar script:
#   research_notebook/parse_interproscan-by_tool/002_ai-bash-symlink_parsed_to_upload.sh
# Run that script after this manifest is processed, OR run it standalone --
# the two are independent (no manifest entry overlaps the parsed dirs).
# SignalP signal peptide predictions (incomplete - only 2 species so far)
# output_to_input/BLOCK_signalp/*.tsv
